column1: Table 3-24:  2022 Adjusted Non-Energy Use Fossil Fuel Consumption, Storage, and Emissions
+ Does not exceed 0.05 TBtu, MMT C, or MMT CO2 Eq.
a To avoid double counting, net exports have been deducted.
